notes: solar_flood crosswalk is PENDING_UPSTREAM_ARTIFACTS: no solar-specific flood depth-damage artifact exists; depth->DR is a generic industrial proxy (JRC North America Industrial).
Only 3 of 34 benchmark rows normalize to a $/MW basis (DEPCOM avoided-loss, VDE/AXIS portfolio aggregate, Valdora measured zero). Isolated solar-flood $/MW physical severity is genuinely scarce.
Flood failure unit is electrical/BOS/foundation (FLOOD_ELECTRICAL_BOS), NOT PV module glass; value ladder is reused from solar_hail because it is peril-agnostic.
Row counts above equal the actual data-row counts of the corresponding CSVs and the source_registry.json length.
